description: CompositionPeach round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a pouch and graphic print on the frontWash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitJoin the tribe of fashionistas from around the world in this cool peach tee from jealous 21. The stylish graphic on the front is inspired by features that make each woman look unique. Team it with white shorts or skinny jeans for an outing with friends and look hot all the way. Carry it in that cute pouch for quick weekend getaways or sleepovers.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.8", Chest-33"
